title: All In One copies opponent primary attack dice and modifier

card.rawText: Add your opponent's primary creature's base Atk Dice Rolls and Modifier to the equipped creature. This effect cannot stack.

effect.value: Add opponent primary base Atk Dice Rolls and base Modifier

plan.title: All In One copies opponent primary attack dice and modifier
plan.summary: Equip All In One to a 1-die, modifier-zero creature while the opponent primary has 2 base Atk Dice Rolls and +1 Modifier, then verify a follow-up hit roll uses 3 dice and +1 modifier.

notes: Place test_primary_creature_mod_0 on player_1 field as primary.
Place test_primary_creature on player_2 field as primary so its base Atk Dice Rolls are 2 and its base Modifier is 1.

steps: Player 1 plays All In One and equips it to their primary creature.
Run a follow-up battle with the equipped creature attacking.
Inspect the resolved hit roll dice count and modifier.

expectedAssertions.label: Hit roll gained opponent primary base modifier
Hit roll gained opponent primary base attack dice
All In One remains equipped/on field

manualVerification: Confirm multiple copies of this effect do not stack.
riskNotes: This covers dynamic recalculation against the current opponent primary's base attack stats.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The LLM only proposes the fixture. The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
